title: Helorchis filiformis
taxonomy: Helorchis filiformis is a genus of flowering plants in the orchid family. It is native to the Himalayan region and is classified under the family Orchidaceae. Within the Orchidaceae family, Helorchis filiformis is placed in the subfamily Orchidoideae and further divided into the tribe Orchideae. The species is often recognized by its thin, elongated leaves and inflorescence. This classification helps in identifying and understanding the unique characteristics of the Helorchis filiformis species.
